final:
module johnson_counter(
  input clk,
  input rst_n,
  output reg [3:0] count
);

  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (~rst_n)
      count <= 4'b0000;
    else
      count <= {~count[3], count[3:1]};
  end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count; // This statement does not change the count value
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: count <= count; // This statement does not change the count value
